title: PVP HD
description: A Texturepack that turns PVP Relevant items into CLEAN HD Versions
body:
# PVP HD
PVP HD turns PVP related items into CLEAN HD Versions making the PVP experience much smoother.
The new Textures have an 1080px1080p Resolution and some event have animated Textures like:
- The Enderpearl
- Firework Rockets

Normal Retextured Items/Blocks:
- All Swords
- All Axes
- The Mace
- Windcharges
- Snowballs
- Enchanted Bottles
- Bow & Crossbow
- Cobwebs
- Apple & Golden Apple
- Netherite Ingot & Netherite Scrap
- Obsidian
- Crystals

## All items:
